creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Greg V from comment #8)
> Still not migrating to actually using mach/mozbuild? :(

ENOTIME. Mk/bsd.gecko.mk needs refactoring. OTOH, I don't use most of gecko@: libxul, thunderbird, seamonkey, plugins, xpi-*, *-i18n, .desktop files, dtrace, sndio, v4l, gnome integration, pgo, etc. Even www/firefox is just a backup plan for when using Nightly is too rough.

If it proves to be too hard I can always revert to
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-gecko/2015-September/005697.html
